sounds.label: Sounds
sounds.help: Fun little sound effects when you learn and trade. On by default.

dailyGoal.help: How much XP you aim for each day.

reminders.streakHelp: A friendly evening nudge if your streak is about to end. Off by default.
reminders.streakDenied: Turn on notifications for InvestiKid in your device Settings to use reminders.
reminders.alertsHelp: One short heads-up if your streak is about to end. Your grown-up turned this option on. Off by default.
reminders.alertsDenied: Turn on notifications for InvestiKid in your device Settings to use alerts.

faceId.label: Sign in with Face ID
faceId.help: Unlock InvestiKid with Face ID instead of your password. Your grown-up turned this on.

leaderboard.hideHelp: When on, your name won't appear on any InvestiKid leaderboard.

resetConfirm.title: Start fresh?
resetConfirm.message: Start your practice portfolio over in {{currency}}? This clears your current play holdings and history. Your XP and badges are safe.
